verdict: The chart has good structure and song mapping, but contains major difficulty spikes (8th notes directly connected to jumps) and highly syncopated rhythms that are inappropriate for an Easy chart.

issues.problem: An 8th note tap on U immediately following a JUMP LR is a massive difficulty spike that is too physically demanding for an Easy chart.
Extended syncopated sequence using dotted-quarter rhythms (off-beats) is highly confusing for beginners and should be simplified to steady quarter notes.
An 8th note transition from a tap U directly into a JUMP LR is too fast and mechanically complex for players at this level.
An isolated 8th note tap here creates an unnecessary difficulty spike during the outro.
